calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-23-2012 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-12-2012 Continued To Jun-11-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Appearance for Plaintiff. James Attridge, Esq., appearing specially for Defendant ABF Freight Systems. The OSC is re-set to 6/11/2012 at 2:00 PM, in Department 610. Court granted Defendant's oral request for an order to file Notice of removal without payment of First Appearance Fee. Mr. Attridge to prepare order for court's signature. Proceedings not reported. (610)
